title: gladiolus communis subsp. illyricus
intro: Gladiolus communis subsp. illyricus, also known as the Illyrian gladiolus, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Iridaceae. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Gladiolus communis subsp. illyricus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
